description: A streamlined corpus merging all backgrounds into a single Generic class for robust Global Whitening, combined with visually-rich anomaly prompts.

prompt_config.note: Use 'Generic' for all videos to force Global Whitening. Anomaly prompts are optimized for visual variance to support LDA-style covariance.

Generic: Normal video footage of a daily life scene with standard lighting
A video recording of a peaceful environment without violence
Standard quality video clip showing routine human activity
Background scenery with steady camera movement
A shot of people interacting normally in a public or private space
Video footage showing a calm street, room, or building
Generic daylight video with natural lighting conditions
Night time footage with street lights and ambient noise
Interior shot of a building with people walking calmly
Exterior view of a city landscape or natural scenery
A cinematic scene from a movie showing dialogue or walking
Video game footage of navigation or non-combat gameplay
Surveillance camera feed monitoring a quiet area
Handheld camera video of a personal vlog or travel
Dashboard camera view of driving on a road safely
Broadcast footage of a standard sports or news event
Low resolution video with some digital noise but no chaos
High definition video with sharp details of objects
Unedited raw video footage of a common calm scene
Visual context showing a stable environment
